promptCaching.label: What is prompt caching?
promptCaching.body: Repeated prompt prefixes or context may be reused and priced differently by some providers when sent again.

cacheHitRate.label: What is cache hit rate?
cacheHitRate.body: The percentage of eligible prompt or context tokens expected to be billed as cached reads instead of regular input.

cachedInput.label: What is cached input?
cachedInput.body: Tokens expected to use cached-read pricing instead of standard input pricing.

cacheWrite.label: What is cache write?
cacheWrite.body: Provider-specific cost, if any, to establish cacheable content the first time.

systemPromptTokens.label: What are system prompt tokens?
systemPromptTokens.body: Recurring instructions sent on every request; they add to input or cached-input cost each call.

contextHistoryTokens.label: What are context and history tokens?
contextHistoryTokens.body: Carried conversation or retrieved context that raises the cost of each request.

outputTokens.label: What are output tokens?
outputTokens.body: Tokens the model generates in its reply, billed at the output rate.

tokenEstimate.label: How are tokens estimated?
tokenEstimate.body: Rough guidance only, not exact billing. Roughly one token per four characters in English-like text.

interactionsPerDay.label: What are interactions per day?
interactionsPerDay.body: Requests modeled per day; they scale per-interaction cost into daily, monthly, and yearly totals.

cacheUnavailable.label: Why is there no cache pricing?
cacheUnavailable.body: This provider does not publish cache-specific pricing, so cache tokens are treated as regular input here.

pricingSnapshot.label: What is a pricing snapshot?
pricingSnapshot.body: A versioned capture of provider and model prices. Every cost on screen is computed from the active snapshot, not from live pricing pages.

auth.title: Sign in to Cost Console
auth.subtitle: Use your portfolio account to continue.
auth.createAccountSubtitle: This email is new here. Set a password to register.
auth.welcomeBackSubtitle: Enter your password to sign in.
auth.metaPasswordDescription: Enter your password to sign in to Cost Console.
auth.metaRegisterDescription: Register a new account to use Cost Console.
auth.signOutConfirmDescription: You will need to sign in again to use Cost Console.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.membershipBlocked: Your access to this app is not active. Contact an admin.
errors.emailExists: That email already has an account. Sign in instead.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unreachable: Could not reach the server. Try again shortly.

privateError.title: This view could not load
privateError.body: The pricing database may be unavailable or not yet configured. Confirm the database is running and try again.

tokenLab.title: Token Lab
tokenLab.description: Estimate how many tokens a piece of text is. The result is approximate, not exact billing math.
tokenLab.placeholder: Paste or type any text to estimate its tokens.
tokenLab.note: ≈ 1 token per ~4 characters in English-like text. One A4 page is roughly 400–900 tokens depending on language, density, and formatting.

chat.metaDescription: Estimate chat token cost with prompt caching, interaction volume, and rollups.
chat.title: Model chat token cost
chat.description: Estimate request and session cost from token buckets, interaction volume, and prompt caching. Calculations run on the backend against the active pricing snapshot.
chat.noPricing: No chat pricing is available in the active snapshot.
chat.cacheUnavailable: {provider} does not publish prompt caching for this model, so the cache hit rate has no effect on the estimate.

costSummary.selectModel: Select a model to see the cost estimate.
costSummary.cacheUnavailableNote: {provider} does not publish cache pricing for {model}; cache tokens are billed as regular input.

savedScenarios.title: Saved scenarios
savedScenarios.body: Saving scenarios is not available yet. Scenario persistence is reserved until ownership and privacy rules are defined.

access.title: Admin access required
access.body: Pricing snapshot management is reserved for project admins. Standard users can continue using the playground but cannot open snapshot administration routes.

snapshots.metaDescription: Admin-only pricing snapshot surface for Cost Console.
snapshots.title: Pricing snapshots
snapshots.body: This surface is restricted to project admins. It lists captured pricing snapshots and opens each one for catalog drill-down, behind admin-only navigation and API guards.
snapshots.empty: No pricing snapshots have been captured yet.

detail.coverageValue: {count, plural, =0 {No catalog rows} one {# row} other {# rows}}

catalog.heading: Pricing catalog
catalog.description: Per-model prices captured in this snapshot. Every row carries the cited source it was traced from.

systemPrompt.label: Where are system prompt tokens?
systemPrompt.body: System prompts are not a separate catalog line. They are billed as input tokens at the model's input price, or at the cached-input price when prompt caching applies.

catalog.empty: This snapshot has no catalog rows yet.
catalog.caption: Prices are per 1M tokens · {currency}
